column6: A soft mint sling bag with gold accents, Layli embodies dreamy, graceful evenings. Elegant, yet practical, it brings out your gentler side, with a midnight-blue lining and a crescent clasp closure.
A crescent-shaped shoulder bag in soft matte blue, designed for calm sophistication. Firdaws is the perfect everyday companion that blends minimalism with a touch of celestial charm.
This structured bucket bag features delicate floral motifs and a cream palette—perfect for those who love soft, romantic aesthetics. Firyal brings a timeless feminine touch to any look.
With its rich chocolate tones and classic silhouette, Ghubar is a heritage-inspired handbag that exudes strength and elegance—ideal for formal and executive settings.
The Hijaz bag combines white and brown in a sleek, modern shoulder design. It reflects balance, modesty, and timeless taste—ideal for daily wear or casual elegance.
Joud is a unique cylindrical bucket bag adorned with blue floral embroidery and golden accents, symbolizing generosity and luxury in every stitch.
With its black and ivory palette and equestrian-inspired buckle, Mahra brings out a bold yet classic style—perfect for making a subtle statement.
Woven textures and a structured form define Nibras. Inspired by artisanal craftsmanship, it reflects grounded wisdom and understated elegance.
Sleek in pale sage with a structured frame, Raqi is the embodiment of class. Its name meaning 'elegant'" is no coincidence—this bag speaks sophistication."
A vintage-inspired design with a rich brown top flap and cream body—Rawya is for the storyteller in you. Carry memories with grace.
A petite shoulder bag in cream and caramel—Rim is refined and compact, offering chic simplicity for day-to-night transitions.
A structured black bag with bold lines and gold hardware, Saifan is your everyday armor—strong, stylish, and built for ambition.
Petite, boxy, and crafted in rich brown leather, Salsabil is the definition of quiet luxury. Small in size, big in impression.
An ornate handbag with golden floral textures—Sana brings celebration to your outfit. It’s for those who live vibrantly and elegantly.
A graceful ivory evening clutch with subtle gold details, Shams (meaning 'sun'") radiates effortless charm and serenity."
This light blue rectangular sling bag is sweet and refined, perfect for adding a soft splash of color to your look. Tiba is all about grace in simplicity.
Bold in red with a striking structure, Wahaj stands for radiant energy. This piece adds power and fire to your outfit.
Crafted like a blooming rose, Warda is a soft-textured, floral-accented bag perfect for garden parties, weddings, or a romantic day out.
A light blush pink shoulder bag—Zahwa exudes sweetness and subtle charm. Ideal for gentle souls and minimalist styles.
Rich and dark greenish-black with a bold structure—Zumurrud (meaning 'emerald'") is for the confident
Blue Crocodile Bag, very unique and eye-catching—Maghfira stands out as a bold statement piece.
A sophisticated box clutch with a houndstooth pattern and gold clasp. Azmina is perfect for evening events and adds a touch of vintage elegance to any outfit.
A crescent-shaped hobo bag in rich brown with woven texture and gold hardware. Jawhara means 'jewel'" and truly lives up to its name with timeless sophistication."
A luxurious woven hobo bag in deep chocolate brown. Liyana offers spacious elegance with its soft structure, perfect for those who appreciate artisanal craftsmanship.
An elegant ivory clutch with quilted texture and delicate gold hardware. Nayyara brings celestial beauty to your evening ensemble with its clean, refined design.
A charming shoulder bag featuring floral embroidery in coral tones. Noura radiates light and femininity, perfect for spring and summer occasions.
A structured woven tote in navy blue with gold accents. Raniya exudes queenly confidence and is ideal for professional settings or sophisticated daily wear.
A rich burgundy woven bag with elegant structure. Riham is perfect for those who appreciate deep, luxurious tones and timeless design.
A sleek burgundy clutch with quilted texture and gold clasp. Ruwayda offers understated luxury in a compact form, perfect for evening elegance.
A statement woven box bag in deep burgundy with gold hardware. Safiyya means 'pure'" and delivers pure sophistication with its structured design."
A vibrant turquoise box bag with quilted texture and gold details. Thara brings a pop of color and joy to any outfit with its playful yet elegant design.
A golden woven clutch with intricate texture. Yasira shines with effortless grace, perfect for special occasions where you want to make a subtle statement.
A sophisticated striped box bag in neutral tones with gold hardware. Yusra offers modern elegance with its geometric pattern and structured form.
A chic colorblock box bag in navy and tan. Zahira radiates brilliance with its modern design, perfect for the contemporary woman who values style and function.
An elegant sage green box bag with gold hardware. Zarfa brings refined grace with its soft color and structured silhouette, ideal for sophisticated daily wear.
